package rulefixtures

import (
	"fmt"
	"log"
)

// scenario for log_level_check_after_format: `zap.S().Debugf("expensive %v", computeDebug())` or `logrus.Debugf("data: %v", expensiveCall())` where the expensive computation happens regardless of log level
// fixture polarity: positive; family: library; severity: info.
func scenario415Positive(values []string) {
	for _, value := range values {
		log.Print(fmt.Sprintf("value=%s", value))
	}
}
